title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: EMEA is executing the world's most coordinated regulatory transformation—21 EU events center on MiCA operationalisation while 6 UK consultations finalise the post-Brexit authorisation gateway, and 6 Middle Eastern jurisdictions race to implement FATF-aligned licensing before Q4. The EU's AMLA becomes operational in Q3 with direct CASP supervision, France's PSAN-to-MiCA deadline hits July 1, and the UK's FCA sets firm authorisation cutoffs. This isn't policy debate anymore—it's mass compliance in
